mapper.sql: id, uploadid,perfstarttime, lastruntime, scriptname, threads, `label`, samples, ko, error, average, `min`, `max`, thpct90, thpct95, thpct99, median, throughput, received, sent, ip, starttime, endtime, jtlpath, indexpath, `state`
mapper.update: update statistics set state = 2 where state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER}
update statistics set lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
SELECT id,scriptname,threads,label,samples,error,average,min,max,thpct90,thpct95,thpct99,median,throughput,ip,starttime,endtime,jtlpath,indexpath,state,received,sent FROM ( select id,uploadid,perfstarttime,lastruntime,scriptname,threads,label,samples,error,average,min,max,thpct90,thpct95,thpct99,median,throughput,ip,starttime,endtime,jtlpath,indexpath,state,received,sent from statistics ORDER BY id ASC )t
order by id asc

select id,scriptname,threads,label,samples,error,average,min,max,thpct90,thpct95,thpct99,median,throughput,ip,starttime,endtime,jtlpath,indexpath,state,received,sent from statistics where state = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} ORDER BY id asc

SELECT * FROM ( select * from statistics order by id desc )t
order by starttime desc, id desc
mapper.insert: insert into statistics (uploadid,perfstarttime, lastruntime, scriptname, threads, `label`, samples, ko, error, average, `min`, `max`, thpct90,median, thpct95, thpct99, throughput, received, sent, ip, starttime, endtime, jtlpath, indexpath, `state` ) values ( #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{perfstarttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{median,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into statistics
id,
uploadid,
lastruntime,
scriptname,
threads,
`label`,
samples,
ko,
error,
average,
`min`,
`max`,
thpct90,
thpct95,
thpct99,
throughput,
received,
sent,
ip,
starttime,
endtime,
jtlpath,
indexpath,
`state`,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update statistics
uploadid = #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR},
scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`label` = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ko = #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error = #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
average = #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`min` = #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`max` = #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct90 = #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct95 = #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
thpct99 = #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
throughput = #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
received = #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sent = #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
jtlpath = #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
`state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update statistics set uploadid = #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, lastruntime = #{lastruntime,jdbcType=CHAR}, scriptname = #{scriptname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threads = #{threads,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `label` = #{label,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, samples = #{samples,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ko = #{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error = #{error,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, average = #{average,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `min` = #{min,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `max` = #{max,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct90 = #{thpct90,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct95 = #{thpct95,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, thpct99 = #{thpct99,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, throughput = #{throughput,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, received = #{received,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sent = #{sent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ip = #{ip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, starttime = #{starttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, endtime = #{endtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, jtlpath = #{jtlpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, indexpath = #{indexpath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `state` = #{state,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select: select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and perfstarttime = #{perfstarttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR } and label like concat('%', #{label}, '%') ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and scriptname like concat('%', #{scriptname}, '%') and label like concat('%', #{label}, '%') ORDER BY id asc

select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and perfstarttime = #{perfstarttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR } and ko =#{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR } and locate('Total',label)=0 ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and scriptname like concat('%', #{scriptname}, '%') and ko =#{ko,jdbcType=VARCHAR } and locate('Total',label)=0 ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and perfstarttime = #{perfstarttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR } and ko !='0.00' and locate('Total',label)=0 ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where uploadid= #{uploadid,jdbcType=INTEGER} and scriptname like concat('%',#{scriptname}, '%') and ko !='0.00' and locate('Total',label)=0 ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where perfstarttime = #{perfstarttime,jdbcType=VARCHAR } ORDER BY id asc
select * from statistics where scriptname like concat('%', #{scriptname}, '%') ORDER BY starttime desc
select * from statistics where scriptname like concat('%', #{scriptName}, '%') and label like concat('%', #{label}, '%') ORDER BY id asc
